introSection: Wild Mouse is a steel wild mouse roller coaster currently located at Antibes Land in Antibes, Provence-Alpes-Côte d'Azur, France.

sections.title: History
sections.content: The ride originally opened in 1996 at Expoland in Suita, Osaka, Japan. It was simply named Wild Mouse (Japanese: ワイルドマウス) and was located next to the park entrance. It closed with the park on 9 December 2007 due to an accident with Fujin Raijin II earlier that year. It was relocated to Walygator Parc, where it was stored next to a warehouse for three years, eventually being removed in 2012. It eventually reappeared in 2014, when it opened in Antibes Land with a new colour scheme.

sections.title: Colour scheme
sections.content: Red track and green supports. It used to feature blue track and yellow track at Expoland.

fullText:
Wild Mouse is a steel wild mouse roller coaster currently located at Antibes Land in Antibes, Provence-Alpes-Côte d'Azur, France.

The ride originally opened in 1996 at Expoland in Suita, Osaka, Japan. It was simply named Wild Mouse (Japanese: ワイルドマウス) and was located next to the park entrance. It closed with the park on 9 December 2007 due to an accident with Fujin Raijin II earlier that year. It was relocated to Walygator Parc, where it was stored next to a warehouse for three years, eventually being removed in 2012. It eventually reappeared in 2014, when it opened in Antibes Land with a new colour scheme.



Red track and green supports. It used to feature blue track and yellow track at Expoland.
